strengths: Currently builds AI-agent infrastructure hands-on at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly relevant to the agentic-AI core of this role

Deep distributed-systems credentials: at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic he worked on microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O and real-time data, matching the event-streaming and real-time inference demands

Meaningful fintech and leadership signal: reshaped investment practices at RIDE Capital, owned multi-country pricing at Optilyz, and has run his own event-driven geo-data platform (GISCollective) as founder since 2016
concerns: No explicit evidence of scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people or operating at the executive/board level
Agentic-AI experience is recent and tooling-focused; the resume does not document production multi-agent systems with financial consequences
Credit-risk, working-capital, and multi-jurisdiction compliance domain depth is not directly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Hands-on agentic-AI and MCP infrastructure work
Fintech product experience plus founder-level ownership and engineering-culture leadership

response.justification: Bogdan pairs rare breadth — nearly two decades across backend, embedded, mobile, and platform work — with the two pillars this role rests on: current, hands-on agentic-AI infrastructure development and hard-won distributed-systems experience at millions-of-requests-per-second scale. His fintech exposure at RIDE Capital and pricing-engine ownership at Optilyz show he can apply that engineering depth in regulated, money-moving contexts, while nine years as founder of an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployed open-source platform demonstrates sustained architectural ownership. His long record of TDD, CI/CD discipline, and teaching (workshops, dojos, courses) maps directly to the culture of evaluation rigor and production reliability the company wants its CTO to instill, making him a compelling candidate to advance.
